subcodes.first_line: O seeker of enlightenment from the rays of guidance: strive in this divine Cause, wherein the Holy Spirit is the first servant and eager worker [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مستشرق از انوار هدایت در این امر الهی که روح القدس اول خادم و ساعیست جهدی
subcodes.subjects: @recompense; reward for belief; right action, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @The Holy Spirit
